result:
Added a `search` command to the CLI in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go). It now accepts `notes search <query>`, scans all Markdown notes in `notes/`, matches case-insensitively against both the extracted title and full file body, and prints matching notes in the same `id timestamp title` format as `list`. I also refactored note enumeration into a shared loader so `list` and `search` use the same ordering.

I added coverage for the new behavior in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go): title/body matches, missing-query validation, no-match output, and top-level `run` dispatch. The docs in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md) now include the new command and its behavior.

I could not run `go test` in this environment because the `go` binary is not installed here.
